reviews.review_description: The game is a brilliant masterpiece. It starts you out thinking it is a pleasant and light hearted game. I honestly messed around with everything for a while. Until a different looking pair of goggles, were pointed out to me. It was a very scary experience, since I couldn’t leave. When I came out, I realized what this game really is. Playing the game is a fun time, but I’m always scared playing it. It gave off the feeling of something like portal. I wouldn’t spoil much more, but this game has many possibilities on what happens to the player. This game is something I am scared of, yet always exciting to play.
I bought Oculus Go to play this game (and porn of course). I wasn't disappointed!
it was fun and had good Quality I mostly loved the free Rome￼￼￼
The game actually lets u explore it and it’s kinda scary when the flying headsets come at u and extending the strap
I got the oculus go because it was cheaper than the quest I was expecting it to have no good games but this is amazing best game on the go for sure
This game is so cool. I have yet to beat it as I have just got it but needless to say it is so cool. And to the developers of this game. GREAT JOB
Graphics are alright got it because I watched a YouTuber play it. Was worth it
I was a little confused on what to do at first, but eventually got the hang of it. Still playing, but fun nonetheless.

This is truly revolutionary for the world of mobile VR, probably the first game I've played on this system that really feels at home being in VR. A lot of the scenes are so well made and the events that play out make you want to keep playing more.

Never thought a VR game about more VR would be so much fun. Definitely one you need to check out.

reviews.review_title: A must have for any user
reviews.review_description: I would recommend this game to anyone with a iCloud go, works great to play on your own or mess with friends.
It’s really fun and cool
You need to try this game for yourself, but all I have to say about it (without spoiling it much) is BUTTER SUCK
Great game. Very interactive

this game is so fun I played for like 40 minutes and had a blast!! Starts out a bit slow (like usual games) but it gets better as you go.. has a plot twist going on! Can't wait to figure it out ([review update]Finished the game and it was fun  and  had an interesting end! please add a part two or some DLC)

This game is seriously evil it’s super weird and it glitches and when you tried to delete it it won’t let you until you finish the game it’s super creepy and it’s talking about how it’s going to take over the world do not buy the game I warn you it looks fun but it’s really not do not buy the game

reviews.review_title: Best game on oculus go by far!
reviews.review_description: I really liked this game from the get-go, Chaz is my favorite character, and it is hard to put down.  The only reason this game isn’t a 5 star is because of how short it is, I am stuck in an endless loop of pleasure for the scandalous giant stick of butter.  I really like how there is a big ominous secret around activitude, and uncovering it makes the game even more fun!
Dude this is so cool. I love that you can put on different headsets to go into different dimensions. And I wish there was a free play option. #bestvrgameforoculusgo
Good game but not sure what to do

reviews.review_title: Must buy if you own a mobile headset
reviews.review_description: I played throught the entire game and was blown away by the quality of the gameplay,story and humor
